creator: charlz_klug@mail.ru
text:
Warnings on Sams (/usr/ports/www/sams) web-interface. After logon and select user on user list I get the next warnings:
Warning: strftime() [function.strftime]: It is not safe to rely on the system's timezone settings. You are *required* to use the date.timezone setting or the date_default_timezone_set() function. In case you used any of those methods and you are still getting this warning, you most likely misspelled the timezone identifier. We selected 'Asia/Samarkand' for 'UZT/5.0/no DST' instead in /usr/local/share/sams/src/usertray.php on line 336

Warning: strftime() [function.strftime]: It is not safe to rely on the system's timezone settings. You are *required* to use the date.timezone setting or the date_default_timezone_set() function. In case you used any of those methods and you are still getting this warning, you most likely misspelled the timezone identifier. We selected 'Asia/Samarkand' for 'UZT/5.0/no DST' instead in /usr/local/share/sams/src/usertray.php on line 337

Warning: strftime() [function.strftime]: It is not safe to rely on the system's timezone settings. You are *required* to use the date.timezone setting or the date_default_timezone_set() function. In case you used any of those methods and you are still getting this warning, you most likely misspelled the timezone identifier. We selected 'Asia/Samarkand' for 'UZT/5.0/no DST' instead in /usr/local/share/sams/src/usertray.php on line 338

Fix: Insert "date_default_timezone_set('Asia/Samarkand');" string in /usr/local/share/sams/src/usertray.php file at 336 string.

Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: Logon to Sams web-interface and select user from user list.
